items.description: Sponsor Star calesthio / OpenMontage World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
Star apple / container A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

Star ZhuLinsen / daily_stock_analysis LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
Star NousResearch / hermes-agent The agent that grows with you
Star JCodesMore / ai-website-cloner-template Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
Star google-labs-code / design.md A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
Star revfactory / harness A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.
Star stablyai / orca Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
Star interviewstreet / hiring-agent AI agent to evaluate and score resumes.
Star kunchenguid / no-mistakes git push no-mistakes
Star andreknieriem / headunit-revived Headunit App for displaying Android Auto
Star flutter / flutter Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond
